query: I need to build a landing page for my new fitness tracking app, something that feels like apple.com with nice scroll animations and a dark hero section
the buttons on my dashboard look flat and lifeless, can you make them feel more tactile with better hover and press states? like how apple does it
run an accessibility audit on my index.html, I need WCAG AA compliance before we launch next week and my PM is asking about VoiceOver support
I have this 15 second screen recording of a website with really nice parallax scroll effects and staggered card reveals, can you analyze it and recreate something similar for my project?
my react native app needs a settings screen with toggles, a profile section with an avatar, and a dark mode switch. make it feel native and polished on iOS
redesign my saas pricing page, the current one looks like every other boring pricing page out there. I want something that actually makes people want to upgrade
add some floating gradient orbs and a subtle noise grain texture to the hero section of my portfolio site, and make the heading text shimmer with a gradient animation
the cards in my features section have jerky hover animations using ease-in-out and the spacing feels random. fix the motion to feel smooth like apple.com and align everything to a proper grid
review my checkout flow component for design quality — I want to make sure the typography, spacing, colors, and interactions all meet Apple HIG standards before I ship it
I'm building a SwiftUI app and need to set up the tab bar navigation with proper SF Symbols, system colors, and spring animations on the tab transitions
can you help me set up a PostgreSQL database with tables for users, orders, and products? I need proper indexes and foreign key constraints
write unit tests for my authentication middleware in Express.js, I need to cover the JWT verification and refresh token rotation logic
I need to deploy my Next.js app to Vercel with a custom domain and set up the DNS records. Also need to configure environment variables for production
fix the memory leak in my Node.js websocket server, it's consuming 2GB after running for 3 hours and I think it's related to the event listener cleanup
help me write a Python script that reads a CSV file with 500k rows, filters by date range and category, then generates a summary report as a PDF
set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions for my monorepo — I need separate workflows for the frontend and backend with caching and parallel test runs
I need to implement rate limiting on my REST API endpoints using Redis, with different limits per tier (free: 100/hr, pro: 1000/hr, enterprise: unlimited)
migrate my app from class components to React hooks, specifically the ones using componentDidMount, componentWillUnmount, and getDerivedStateFromProps
can you analyze the performance of my SQL queries? I have a slow dashboard page and I think it's the JOIN between orders and line_items tables that's causing the 4 second load time
help me configure my webpack build to reduce the bundle size, I need tree shaking, code splitting by route, and lazy loading for the heavy chart library
